data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Dietary/restriction tracking across stops'. While the linked use case mentions dietary restrictions being noted and venues being notified, there is no concrete evidence of an API or functionality that explicitly tracks these dietary restrictions across multiple stops. This lack of direct evidence leads to a conclusion that there is a gap in the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence of an API or functionality for tracking dietary restrictions across multiple stops.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
